title: Super Metroid
edition_pinned: Row describes the 1994 SNES design; genre evidence from archived Wii U Virtual Console product page, observed 2026-07-13.
moat: Ability-gated map reconnection turns one connected planet into ordered power-route discovery.
scope_efficiency_hypothesis: New movement tools reopen old rooms, multiplying backtracking value without new biomes each time.
exemplar_rationale: Defines ability-gated exploration depth later labeled Metroidvania.

evidence.claim: Archived Nintendo Wii U Virtual Console product page listed Genre as: Action; Adventure.
evidence.platform: Nintendo Store (archived Wii U Virtual Console)
